Meta.title: Notkode, we activate AI in your business
Meta.description: We find where AI drives results in your business and implement it end to end: custom systems, agents and automations. From diagnosis to implementation.

Nav.agentesAutomacaoDesc: Chatbots, virtual assistants and n8n integrations
Nav.sitesDesc: Institutional sites, landing pages and blogs with live pricing.
Nav.ecommerceDesc: Online store built to convert: catalog to checkout.
Nav.brandbookDesc: Logo, palette, typography and complete brandbook.

Home.homeHeroLine2: but don't know where to start.
Home.activationEyebrow: How we activate AI in your business
Home.activationTitlePre: Applying AI any which way gets you nowhere.
Home.activationTitleAccent: Activate it where it truly pays off.
Home.activationDesc: You don't need one more AI tool. You need to know what to apply in your business and why. We dive into your operation, show you where artificial intelligence pays off, and get it running, from diagnosis to delivery.
Home.activationStep1Desc: We dive into your operation to understand how you work today, where the bottleneck is and what technology can actually solve.
Home.activationStep2Desc: We show you where AI generates real results in your business and prioritize by fastest return. No hype, no empty promises.
Home.activationStep3Desc: We build the custom solution, system, agent or automation, ship it and follow through to make sure it delivers the agreed result.
Home.activationCtaText: Want to implement AI in your company? Talk to us.
Home.activationCtaWhatsappMessage: Hi! I'd like to understand where AI can drive results in my business. Can we talk?
Home.showcaseDesc: Centralize CRM, automation, AI and dashboards in a single solution built around your process.
Home.feature1Desc: Made for the way you work, not adapted from a generic template.
Home.feature2Desc: An intelligent assistant trained on your data, clients and processes.
Home.feature3Desc: No platform subscription. It's your code, on your server.
Home.feature4Desc: Start small and expand without rebuilding from scratch.
Home.pshV2Output2: Generates PDF and sends by email
Home.pshV2Output3: Creates a task + notifies the rep
Home.pshV2Footer: integrated with your system, no extra tools
Home.caseProblem: Traditional company with years in the market, 100% manual operation in spreadsheets, email and phone. No data was connected; every follow-up depended on the team's memory.
Home.caseSolution: Internal system with auditable pipeline, AI that analyzes lost leads and writes the next email in the company's tone, new website connected to the system and paid traffic integrated into the funnel.
Home.servicesDesc: Every activation becomes something concrete: a system, an agent, an automation. It starts with what fixes your biggest bottleneck and grows from there.
Home.servicesSecondaryLabel: We also deliver, with AI inside
Home.serviceSistemasDesc: A custom internal system that replaces your CRM, ERP, spreadsheets and scattered WhatsApp.
Home.serviceAgentesDesc: We connect your tools and automate what your team does manually today. Billing, follow-up, qualification, spreadsheets, email.
Home.serviceSitesDesc: Institutional site, landing page or blog, with AI inside when it makes sense. From brief to live in a few weeks.
Home.serviceEcommerceDesc: Custom store or orchestration of the one you already have, with automation and AI in the funnel. Without bleeding on platform fees.
Home.serviceBrandbookDesc: Logo, palette, typography and applications. Enough for your brand to run consistently.
Home.processDesc: A simple process that takes your idea from paper to reality.
Home.process1Desc: We understand how you work today and where technology makes the most difference.
Home.process2Desc: We choose the right solution and map the fastest path to results.
Home.process3Desc: You track progress every week and watch the product take shape.
Home.process4Desc: We launch together and keep evolving based on what the data shows.
Home.testimonialsTitle: Stories from those who built with Notkode.
Home.testimonialsTitlePre: Stories from those who built with
Home.testimonial1Quote: Notkode was essential for the rapid launch of my project. From the first contact, I received exceptional attention, in negotiation, during the project and at delivery. Highest quality, technique, agility and seriousness. Highly recommend!
Home.testimonial3Quote: Everything was very professional and we were able to quickly transform ideas into reality. I am very happy with the result.
Home.testimonial4Quote: Very attentive service, always with logical and efficient counterpoints. The project was delivered on time and the quality was perfect. I recommend with full confidence.
Home.agencyTitle: Multiply your revenue with white-label dev
Home.agencyDesc: Offer development and AI to your clients without hiring a team. Notkode works behind the scenes.
Home.agencyMockLine2: The product ships with your brand.
Home.finalCtaTitle: Let's find where AI drives results in your business.
Home.finalCtaDesc: Start with the diagnosis. We understand your operation and point out the first paths to activate AI.

Footer.tagline: We activate AI in your business.

SistemasIA.metaDesc: In the AI era, the system should adapt to your business, not the other way around. A custom-built internal system with AI embedded from day one to cut manual work. CRM, support, operations, and reporting on a foundation that's yours.
SistemasIA.heroDesc: In the AI era, the software adapts to you, not the other way around. We build a custom system, with AI already embedded where it actually cuts manual work.
SistemasIA.chaosBullet1: Your company grew, but the operation still runs on duct-tape workarounds.
SistemasIA.chaosBullet2: The team wastes time copying data between spreadsheets, CRM, email, and WhatsApp.
SistemasIA.chaosBullet3: You've tried off-the-shelf SaaS and none fit how your company actually works.
SistemasIA.chaosBullet4: You want to put AI into your operation but don't know where to start, nothing talks properly.
SistemasIA.chaosPhase2Body: Tools that don't talk to each other. Missing pieces that block AI from actually helping. Templates that ask you to change your process to fit them.
SistemasIA.chaosPhase2OutroBefore: We do the opposite: a system designed around your scenario, with
SistemasIA.sobMedidaSubtitle: In the AI era, the system has to adapt to the company, not the other way around. When the foundation is yours, AI can actually work inside your scenario.
SistemasIA.sobMedidaPillar1Title: The system adapts to your business.
SistemasIA.sobMedidaPillar1Body: In the AI era, good software doesn't force you to change processes to fit a template, it learns how your company works and adapts. Custom-built is the opposite of off-the-shelf SaaS.
SistemasIA.sobMedidaPillar2Title: AI needs a foundation to work.
SistemasIA.sobMedidaPillar2Body: Plenty of companies want to apply AI and don't know where to start. Almost always it's because their tools don't talk to each other or pieces are missing. A unified system fixes that base, and clears the way.
SistemasIA.sobMedidaPillar3Body: Every flow is designed from the start around where AI cuts manual work. It's not a plugin glued on later, it's part of the architecture. The result is less repetitive work from day one.
SistemasIA.caseProblem: An operation spread across seven tools that didn't talk: Excel for tracking, Google Drive for certificates, JotForms for enrollments, Google Forms for training feedback, Framer for the website, Airtable as CRM, and Sendgrid for email. Every training still required printed materials, and each class meant juggling spreadsheets and tabs.
SistemasIA.caseSolution: We unified site, admin panel, and client panel into a single system, designed around Loss Prevention's scenario. The full journey, promoting, enrolling, training, evaluating, and issuing certificates, went fully digital, in one place. AI took over the repetitive work: email campaigns are generated in two minutes, with AI itself analyzing past results to improve the next one. The team only reviews what AI did or steps in where a human is actually needed.
SistemasIA.caseMetric1Label: in sales, with no new hires
SistemasIA.faq1Q: Why custom-built instead of off-the-shelf SaaS?
SistemasIA.faq1A: Because in the AI era, the system has to adapt to the company, not the other way around. Off-the-shelf SaaS forces you to change your process to fit a box, and usually leaves gaps between tools that block any real AI work. With a custom build, the foundation is designed around your scenario, and AI is embedded where it cuts manual work for real.
SistemasIA.faq2Q: How long until the system is ready?
SistemasIA.faq2A: It depends on complexity, but most MVPs are ready in 4 to 8 weeks. In the first conversation we can already estimate a timeline for your specific case.
SistemasIA.faq3Q: Do I need to know how to code to use the system?
SistemasIA.faq3A: No. We deliver the system working, with an interface designed for your team, and we include team training in the project.
SistemasIA.faq4Q: What if I want to change something after launch?
SistemasIA.faq4A: The code is yours. You can hire any developer to maintain and evolve the system, or stay with Notkode. No lock-in.
SistemasIA.faq5Q: Is there a monthly fee or recurring cost?
SistemasIA.faq5A: No platform monthly fee. You pay the project once and the system is yours forever. The only recurring cost is infrastructure (server/hosting), which is usually much smaller than the tools the system replaces.
SistemasIA.faq6Q: Will the AI understand my industry?
SistemasIA.faq6A: Yes. Because the system is designed around your scenario, AI starts with the right context, your data, processes, and rules. It's not a generic chatbot bolted onto tools that don't talk: it's AI embedded in the flows where it cuts manual work.
SistemasIA.faq7Q: Do you work with companies of any size?
SistemasIA.faq7A: Yes. We serve everyone from growing companies to larger operations. The system starts at the size that makes sense today and scales with you.
SistemasIA.formDesc: Three short questions to set up a 30-minute conversation built around you. No templates, no cold pitches, no commitment.
SistemasIA.qualNeedsTitle: What do you need to solve?
SistemasIA.qualNeedsSubtitle: You can pick more than one. Pick the last one if you're still figuring it out.
SistemasIA.qualNeedCentralizar: Centralize multiple tools into one system
SistemasIA.qualNeedAtendimento: Customer support with AI built in
SistemasIA.qualContextSubtitle: The more detail, the better we can prep the conversation.
SistemasIA.qualTiming30dias: I have a deadline in mind
SistemasIA.qualWhatsappMessage: I just filled out the AI Systems form on the site, I'd like to move forward.

Cases.metaDesc: Systems, stores, and automations delivered. See how Notkode solved problems for companies like yours.
Cases.heroDesc: 50+ projects delivered in 6 years to growing companies, internal systems, SaaS, e-commerce, and websites. Each case solved a real pain and generated a number that matters.
Cases.ctaPrimary: I want to be the next case

Brandbook.metaDesc: Logo, palette, typography, and brand manual. Ready in 2 to 3 weeks, with editable files in your hands. Combo with site, system, or store comes at a discount.
Brandbook.heroDesc: Logo, palette, typography, and brand manual. Ready in 2 to 3 weeks, with editable files in your hands.
Brandbook.previewDesc: Scroll inside the document and see cover, logo, colors, typography, components, and applications.
Brandbook.card1Desc: Primary, secondary, monogram, and reduced versions. Vectors in SVG, PDF, and PNG.
Brandbook.card2Desc: Colors (primary, secondary, neutrals) with hex/RGB and fonts chosen for the brand.
Brandbook.card3Desc: Identity manual with usage rules: spacing, proportions, correct and forbidden uses.
Brandbook.card4Desc: Templates for social, stationery (business card, signature), and presentations, ready to use.
Brandbook.faq1Q: Do I need a brandbook if I already have a logo?
Brandbook.faq1A: Depends. If you only have a loose logo, without palette, typography, or usage rules, any new designer will create inconsistency. The brandbook is what protects the brand from turning into stray versions across deck, social, and site.
Brandbook.faq2Q: Do you redo the logo from scratch or work with what exists?
Brandbook.faq2A: Both paths. Redo when the mark no longer reflects who the business is today. Refine when the logo has identity but lacks system (palette, typography, applications).
Brandbook.faq3Q: How long until the brand is ready?
Brandbook.faq3A: Between 2 and 3 weeks for the essential brandbook. When it ships alongside a site, system, or store, it runs in parallel and is ready before go-live.
Brandbook.pricingDesc: A few short questions to map your scenario. At the end you see the scope and a preliminary range.
Brandbook.comboLabel: ❯ also doing a site, system, or store?

Privacy.metaDesc: How Notkode collects, stores, and uses your data from the forms on this site.

Blog.metaDesc: Content on internal systems, applied AI, automation, and custom-built technology.

Blog.desc: I'm writing the first articles on applied AI, custom systems, and lean operations. Be back soon.

Ecommerce.metaDesc: Store with its own system: checkout, CRM, and the entire operation inside your domain. No renting piece by piece. When budget doesn't allow yet, we start on Shopify, WooCommerce, or Nuvemshop.
Ecommerce.heroDesc: Online store with its own system: checkout, CRM, and the whole operation inside your domain, no renting piece by piece. When the budget doesn't allow yet, we start on Shopify, WooCommerce, or Nuvemshop and migrate when the store grows. Sketch your project below.
Ecommerce.painEyebrow: The hidden cost of your growth
Ecommerce.painIntro: Platform, coupon app, shipping app, gateway, ERP, plugin for this, plugin for that. Each one bills you. Each one grows with your revenue. Each one takes a slice of margin before you see profit.
Ecommerce.painFooterLabel: Typical bill for a store with decent volume
Ecommerce.painFooterEnd: . With your own system, that becomes a one-time investment, no growth ceiling and no renting pieces of your own operation.
Ecommerce.result2Label: of the code is yours · no lock-in
Ecommerce.sc1Desc: Checkout, CRM, order management, and inventory running inside your system. For those who want out of platform rent for good.
Ecommerce.sc2Desc: Custom storefront on Shopify, WooCommerce, or Nuvemshop, with payment, shipping, tax, and marketing already configured. Entry path before the custom system.
Ecommerce.sc3Desc: Your store is on a platform that no longer scales. We move catalog, customers, and SEO without losing ranking.
Ecommerce.platformsEyebrow: When to start on a platform
Ecommerce.platformsDesc: When budget calls for a more accessible first step, we start on one of these platforms and migrate to the custom system once the store grows. Same care for design, integrations, and operations.
Ecommerce.p1Use: Medium-to-large catalogs, full control of plugins and SEO. Good when you want flexibility to integrate tax, ERP, and BR marketing.
Ecommerce.p2Use: DTC stores with heavy paid traffic. Fast setup, mature apps, conversion focus.
Ecommerce.p3Use: Lean operations focused on the Brazilian market. Mature BR tax and logistics integrations, short learning curve.
Ecommerce.howTitlePre: Three steps until the store sells
Ecommerce.how1Desc: Catalog, gateway, tax, shipping, ERP. We map what's there and what needs to enter. Output: technical plan (platform or custom system) and timeline.
Ecommerce.how2Desc: Conversion-focused design, payment + shipping + tax integration, unlocked admin panel, and checkout tests.
Ecommerce.how3Desc: Monitored launch, pixel and email marketing configuration, first 30 days closely tracked.
Ecommerce.faq1Q: What's the difference between a platform store and a custom-system store?
Ecommerce.faq1A: Platform is rent: fixed monthly fee plus percentage on everything you sell, and you're locked to that ecosystem. Custom system is a one-time investment: checkout, CRM, and operation inside a base where no one charges royalty. We recommend starting on a platform when budget calls for it and migrating to a custom system when operations justify it.
Ecommerce.faq2Q: I'm already on Shopify (or Yampi, Nuvemshop…). Do I need to migrate everything?
Ecommerce.faq2A: Not necessarily. In many cases we integrate what's missing (ERP, automations, custom CRM) and keep the current platform running. Migration only when monthly cost really hurts and the catalog justifies it.
Ecommerce.faq3Q: Do I lose SEO and ranking on migration?
Ecommerce.faq3A: No. We map all old URLs, set up 301 redirects, keep keyword structure, and monitor ranking in the first 4 weeks. In most migrations, traffic holds or grows.
Ecommerce.faq4Q: What about my customer data, where does it go?
Ecommerce.faq4A: You own the database. We migrate customers, order history, and coupons. The CRM stays yours, no platform subscription charging for your own data.
Ecommerce.faq5Q: How long until the store is live?
Ecommerce.faq5A: Between 4 and 8 weeks. A brand-new store takes longer than a migration or optimization. We estimate your case in the first conversation.
Ecommerce.faq6Q: What if I want to switch vendor later?
Ecommerce.faq6A: Switch. The code is yours, the hosting is yours, the database is yours. No long-term commitment, no hostages. Any dev can pick up the work.
Ecommerce.pricingDesc: Four questions to map your scenario. At the end you see the starting price; we close the exact number together in conversation.

Agentes.metaDesc: Chatbots, AI agents, and automations that answer customers, organize orders, and eliminate repetitive tasks. Customer answered, order organized, billing done, without needing you.
Agentes.heroDesc: We automate WhatsApp customer support, order organization, billing, and the repetitive tasks that eat your team's day. You get hours back and your customer is answered immediately, even at 3am.
Agentes.result2Label: from briefing to agent in production
Agentes.uc1Desc: Answers common questions immediately, qualifies the lead, and only hands off to your team when a human is needed. Works overnight too.
Agentes.uc2Title: Orders and customers in one place
Agentes.uc2Desc: Data coming in on WhatsApp lands in the spreadsheet or your system, no one copying manually. No more duplicates.
Agentes.uc3Desc: Your team asks in plain language and the agent fetches the data, generates the report, or notifies the customer. In seconds.
Agentes.uc4Desc: From chasing late payments to sending meeting reminders. What's manual and draining today can run on its own.
Agentes.stackTitlePre: Known tools, set up the way
Agentes.stackDesc: We don't reinvent the wheel. We connect to what you already use and pick the right tech for your case. You get clear documentation of how everything works, no black box.
Agentes.stack1Use: For teams with volume that need the official green check (Meta charges per message). Talk to customers directly through Meta's official account.
Agentes.stack2Use: The brain of the agent. Understands the customer's message, decides what to do, and writes the reply in your brand voice.
Agentes.stack3Use: The plumbing connecting one system to another. Nobody opening tabs or copy-pasting.
Agentes.stack4Use: When the operation still runs on Google Sheets, we integrate. You keep editing the way you already do.
Agentes.stack5Use: HubSpot, RD, Pipedrive, Bling, Omie, Tiny, Notion, Airtable. We connect to what you already use.
Agentes.how1Desc: We dive into the current flow: what your team does, in which tools, where it gets stuck. Output: a before/after diagram.
Agentes.how2Desc: We show how the agent will respond, when it asks, when it hands off to a human. You approve before we build.
Agentes.how3Desc: We ship to production, monitor the first week, and train your team to operate on its own.
Agentes.faq1A: No. It makes sense when you already have high message volume and want the official green check (Meta charges per message). For internal automation or smaller volume, you can use other channels (email, form, Telegram) without that cost.
Agentes.faq2Q: Will it work with the system I already use?
Agentes.faq2A: Yes, in most cases. We connect to your CRM, ERP, Google Sheets, Notion, calendar. If you use HubSpot, RD, Pipedrive, Bling, Omie, Tiny, or any common tool, we integrate. Uncommon systems we evaluate during the conversation.
Agentes.faq3Q: Can I adjust the automation later without calling you?
Agentes.faq3A: Yes. We deliver with documentation and training for your team. Tweaking a message, trigger, or response your team can do on its own. Larger logic changes are worth a call.
Agentes.faq4Q: How long until the first automation is running?
Agentes.faq4A: Simple automation is ready in 1 to 2 weeks. An AI agent with multiple integrations can take 4 to 6 weeks. We estimate your case in the first conversation based on what you need.
Agentes.faq5Q: What if the customer asks something the agent doesn't know?
Agentes.faq5A: The agent never makes things up. When it's unsure, it hands off to someone on your team with the conversation already noted. Your team gets a half-solved lead, not from scratch.
Agentes.pricingDesc: A few questions to understand what you need to automate. We design the right solution for your case and the detailed proposal lands on your WhatsApp within hours.

Sites.metaDesc: Websites, landings, and blogs built to convert. Responsive design, Lighthouse 90+, CMS panel so non-devs can edit content.
Sites.heroDesc: An LP for the campaign launching Monday, or a brand-new institutional site. We design around your goal, not around the template that's easiest for us.
Sites.typesDesc: Before picking a tool, figure out which of these four moments your brand is in. The right format falls out on its own.
Sites.type1Scenario: Your brand is launching or getting a new face.
Sites.type1OneLiner: The showcase that makes the brand look bigger than the team is today.
Sites.type2Scenario: You run ads and the lead needs to drop straight into the funnel.
Sites.type2OneLiner: One page, one mission: convert. Ready to run a campaign on Monday.
Sites.type3Scenario: You want to show up on Google without fighting for ad budget.
Sites.type3OneLiner: Organic traffic that doesn't depend on media spend.
Sites.type4Scenario: Your client speaks another language, or will soon.
Sites.type4OneLiner: Translation treated as content, not as Google Translate.
Sites.aiDesc: AI applied across the process, from design to code, from copy to optimization. That's why we ship in 2 to 4 weeks what other agencies take three months for. No quality cuts.
Sites.aiFooter: Client prefers Framer or WordPress, we'll deliver that too. But the default is AI-accelerated custom builds.
Sites.aiPillar1Desc: Visual direction and UI prototyped with AI before the first line of code.
Sites.aiPillar2Desc: Custom Next.js stack, generated and human-reviewed with AI accelerating every step.
Sites.aiPillar3Desc: Text that sells, written together, calibrated by data and testing, not by guesswork.
Sites.aiPillar4Desc: SEO, performance, and responsiveness applied from the first commit.
Sites.how1Desc: We understand the site goal, audience, and page structure. Output: sitemap + wireframe for each page.
Sites.how2Desc: UI in Figma, clean code, technical SEO, and responsive from the start. Weekly reviews before go-live.
Sites.how3Desc: We go live, configure analytics, and train you to edit content. Support for the first 30 days.
Sites.maintDesc: Optional maintenance plan to keep the site evolving with the business. No new proposal every time you need to change a section or test a new hero.
Sites.maint1Desc: Swap copy, images, create a new page or section without redoing a proposal every time.
Sites.maint2Desc: A/B tests to know what converts. Decisions by data, not by guesswork.
Sites.maint3Desc: Monitored security, uptime, performance, and fixes, so you don't have to think about it.
Sites.faq1Q: How long until the site is live?
Sites.faq1A: Between 2 and 4 weeks for landing pages and mid-sized institutional sites. Sites with blog or multilingual can take 5 to 8 weeks. We estimate your case in the first conversation.
Sites.faq2Q: Do I need a logo and visual identity already?
Sites.faq2A: No, but it helps. If you don't have one, we'll do a simple brandbook (logo, palette, typography, basic applications) as a combo. See the Identity & Brandbook page.
Sites.faq3Q: Framer, WordPress, or Next.js: how do you decide?
Sites.faq3A: By the goal, not the tool. Framer when marketing wants to publish on their own with rich animations. WordPress for heavy blogs or teams used to it. Next.js when performance, technical SEO, or custom integrations matter. We show the trade-offs before closing.
Sites.faq4Q: Is the domain in my name? And the hosting?
Sites.faq4A: Everything in your name. Domain, hosting account, credentials. Notkode locks nothing. If you ever decide to switch vendor, you leave with everything in hand.
Sites.faq5Q: What about content (text, images)? Who does it?
Sites.faq5A: Depends on scope. In the standard package we do the structure and copy of each page based on your briefing. Your own images are welcome; if you don't have them, we use a curated image library or hire photo/render separately.
Sites.faq6Q: How does maintenance work after launch?
Sites.faq6A: Optional monthly plan covering content updates (swap copy, images, create new sections), A/B tests on hero and copy, and technical maintenance (security, performance, uptime). No long-term commitment, and you can pause whenever.
Sites.pricingDesc: Four short questions. At the end you see the starting price and can request a detailed proposal.

Parcerias.metaDesc: Marketing agency or consultancy that needs to deliver tech? Notkode builds what your team can't, with your brand up front.
Parcerias.heroDesc: You close the deal. We build it behind the scenes. Your client gets a custom product with your brand, and you multiply ticket size without changing your team.
Parcerias.highlight1Desc: per project you used to turn down for lack of tech.
Parcerias.highlight2Desc: NDA signed. Your brand, your client, our delivery in the background.
Parcerias.highlight3Desc: Real-time tracking, no surprise calls, no rework.
Parcerias.benefit1Desc: Sell development, AI, and automation beyond marketing, without becoming a software house.
Parcerias.benefit2Desc: Our team delivers as if they were yours. You keep 100% of the client relationship.
Parcerias.benefit3Desc: FastForge™ methodology with weekly deliveries. You track everything in real time.
Parcerias.benefit4Desc: NDA signed, your brand, your client. Notkode stays backstage, or up front if you prefer.
Parcerias.offering1Desc: Custom platforms for clients who want to ditch generic SaaS.
Parcerias.offering2Desc: Intelligent chatbots, WhatsApp automation, n8n flows to free up hours for the client's team.
Parcerias.offering3Desc: SaaS, mobile apps, websites, and e-commerce, from MVP to scale.
Parcerias.formDesc: Three short questions to understand your agency and how we can be your technical arm, no unnecessary call. Reply within 24h.
Parcerias.qualWhatsappMessage: I'm from an agency, filled out the site form and want to talk about a partnership.
Parcerias.qualSuccessBody: Within 24 hours someone from our team will reach out by email and WhatsApp to align how we can be the technical arm of your agency.
Parcerias.qualNeedsTitle: How do you want to expand your portfolio?
Parcerias.qualNeedsSubtitle: You can pick more than one. Pick the last one if you're still figuring it out.
Parcerias.qualNeedSites: Websites and Landing Pages for my clients
Parcerias.qualIdentitySubtitle: Just the essentials so we get the context.
Parcerias.qualContextTitle: When do you want to start?
Parcerias.qualContextSubtitle: Let us know if you already have demand in line or if it's early exploration.
Parcerias.qualTimingDemanda: I already have a client waiting

Sobre.metaDesc: Notkode is a technology studio that builds custom internal systems, automations, and visual identity. Meet the people behind it.
Sobre.heroDesc: We're a Brazilian boutique technology studio helping businesses build software that serves the business, not the other way around. Since 2020, operating from São Paulo for Brazil, US, Canada, and the UK.
Sobre.purposeBody: Give companies back control of their technology. Build software that reflects how each operation actually works, with AI that learns, and code that stays in the right hands:
Sobre.founder1Bio: From art → design → UX → development. Leads product experience and the direct relationship with Notkode's clients.
Sobre.founder2Bio: Experience across software multinationals and Brazilian startups. AI specialist. Led projects in Canada, the US, and the UK.
Sobre.tl1Desc: Notkode is born in São Paulo. Focus on digital design and web development.
Sobre.tl2Desc: Discovered the No-Code movement, still uncharted territory in Brazil.
Sobre.tl3Desc: Early access to ChatGPT. Betting on AI applied to business.
Sobre.tl4Desc: 100% pivot toward technology and AI. Full arsenal of tools, integrations, and models.
Sobre.tl5Desc: First projects for clients in the US, Canada, and the UK.
Sobre.tl6Desc: Doubled down on AI-driven development and intelligent agents.
Sobre.tl7Desc: Launch of the flagship product: custom internal systems with native AI.
Sobre.tl8Desc: 50+ projects delivered. 4 countries served. Custom technology, with AI inside.

BrandbookCombo.body: We build the brandbook (logo, palette, typography, and manual) together with your {companion}. The combo comes at a discount and the identity arrives applied with no reinterpretation.
